title: The Straw Hats Reach Egghead
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, York, Unknown person #2, Jinbe, Unknown person #3, Luffy as The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.
scene: The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: She just popped outta the water!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wait... where did that monster go?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just how far is Luff gonna keep flying?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think that runt's tryin' to say somethin'!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What the hell is this thing?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A shark?! No, it's too big... and it's made of metal?!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Not good! Luffy and the others...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's going to be a rough landing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Steer the ship over to us!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Opening through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
